Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. (212)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lisa A. Villasenor of Manning & Marder, 217-6990, appearing for cross complainant Ayman Shehadeh
Erin Bernstein of the City Attorney's Office, 554-3975, appearing for cross defendant and moving party

The Court made a personal disclosure, and there being no objections, the Court ruled as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT of Ayman Shehadeh is denied as moot as an amended cross complaint has been filed. Ms. Villasenor is to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
